commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=80adac0578f2303946adf357f593506f52074df1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes OpenAI/Codex synthetic app-server auth through the Codex provider usage hook, parses Codex app-server rate-limit payloads, and lets `/status` load an OpenAI usage line when local auth is reported as `unknown`.

PR surface: Source +281, Tests +221. Total +502 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and issue evidence: current main only loads OpenAI usage when the status auth label is oauth/token, while the reported Codex synthetic route has usable runtime auth but no local profile and displays as `unknown`. I did not run a live reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action is contributor/maintainer review: provide real status proof and decide or repair the Plugin SDK boundary; automation cannot supply the contributor's real environment proof.

target.title: fix(status): restore Codex synthetic usage line
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #91694.

- Adds a Codex synthetic usage-auth bridge so OpenAI/Codex usage can route through the Codex provider hook when no local OpenAI OAuth/token profile exists.
- Adds Codex app-server rate-limit parsing into the provider-usage snapshot shape and has the Codex provider fetch `account/rateLimits/read` for the synthetic app-server marker.
- Updates `/status` usage gating so Codex-harness OpenAI/Codex sessions with `unknown` local auth still load the OpenAI/Codex usage line.

## Proof

### Best Reproduction-Environment Proof: Reporter Live VPS OpenClaw

This is the strongest proof for this issue: it was run on the reporter's live VPS OpenClaw host where the bug was originally found.

Environment:
- Host alias: `myvps`
- Hostname: `polymarket-mc`
- Proof checkout: `/tmp/openclaw-91694-proof`
- Source: fresh `openclaw/openclaw` clone plus this PR patch

Commands and results:
- `corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` -> passed.
- `env CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=4 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/provider-usage.auth.plugin.test.ts src/infra/provider-usage.load.plugin.test.ts src/infra/provider-usage.load.test.ts src/infra/provider-usage.fetch.codex.test.ts extensions/codex/provider.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/rate-limits.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-status.test.ts` -> passed, 4 Vitest shards.
  - `src/auto-reply/reply/commands-status.test.ts`: 25 passed, including `loads Codex synthetic usage when OpenAI Codex auth has no local profile`.
  - `src/infra/provider-usage.fetch.codex.test.ts`: 11 passed.
  - `src/infra/provider-usage.auth.plugin.test.ts`, `src/infra/provider-usage.load.plugin.test.ts`, `src/infra/provider-usage.load.test.ts`: 17 passed.
  - `extensions/codex/provider.test.ts` and `extensions/codex/src/app-server/rate-limits.test.ts`: 29 passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false` -> passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --noEmit --incremental false` -> passed.
- `git diff --check` -> passed.

### Local Windows Edit-Loop Proof

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/provider-usage.auth.plugin.test.ts src/infra/provider-usage.load.plugin.test.ts src/infra/provider-usage.load.test.ts src/infra/provider-usage.fetch.codex.test.ts` -> passed, 2 Vitest shards, 4 files, 28 tests.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/provider.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/rate-limits.test.ts` -> passed, 2 files, 29 tests.
- Direct auto-reply config regression: `node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/commands-status.test.ts -t "loads Codex synthetic usage" --config test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply.config.ts --reporter=verbose` -> passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false` -> passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --noEmit --incremental false` -> passed.
- `git diff --check` -> passed.

### Crabbox/Testbox Attempt

- Blacksmith Testbox was attempted first, but the local Blacksmith Docker transport could not reach Docker Desktop from this Windows host.
- Brokered Crabbox was attempted next, but the run failed before remote execution because this Windows host lacked `rsync.exe`.
- Per reporter request, final proof used the live VPS OpenClaw environment where the issue was observed.
target.author: brokemac79
